headline.purpose: Dialog titles and the post-game answer.

label.purpose: Tabs, buttons, metadata, and compact controls.

shadows.name: switch-thumb
shadows.purpose: Structural lift for the moving switch thumb.

motion.name: tile-reveal
motion.purpose: One tile status flip; row delays are 72ms apart.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The decisive result or dialog action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 46px; padding: 0 17px; border: 0; border-radius: 7px; background: var(--ink, oklch(0.19 0.014 65)); color: var(--bg, oklch(1 0 0)); font: 790 0.9rem/1 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 160ms, transform 120ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--ink-soft, oklch(0.34 0.014 65)); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--focus, oklch(0.55 0.18 252)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 46px; padding: 0 17px; border: 1px solid var(--line-strong, oklch(0.72 0.009 75)); border-radius: 7px; background: transparent; color: var(--ink, oklch(0.19 0.014 65)); font: 790 0.9rem/1 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 160ms, transform 120ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--surface, oklch(0.972 0 0)); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--focus, oklch(0.55 0.18 252)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tool Pill
components.description: Compact access to Gjurmë or Besa beside the puzzle label.
components.css: .ds-tool-pill { min-height: 44px; padding: 0 11px; border: 1px solid var(--line, oklch(0.86 0.006 75)); border-radius: 999px; background: var(--bg, oklch(1 0 0)); color: var(--ink-soft, oklch(0.34 0.014 65)); font: 760 0.76rem/1 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-tool-pill span { margin-left: 6px; padding: 3px 6px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--surface-strong, oklch(0.93 0.004 75)); } .ds-tool-pill:hover { background: var(--surface, oklch(0.972 0 0)); } .ds-tool-pill:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--focus, oklch(0.55 0.18 252)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Correct Albanian Tile
components.description: A solved tile with a redundant non-color status mark.
components.css: .ds-tile-correct { position: relative; width: 60px; height: 60px; display: grid; place-items: center; border-radius: 7px; background: var(--correct, oklch(0.5 0.125 145)); color: oklch(1 0 0); font: 860 1.25rem/1 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-tile-correct small { position: absolute; right: 4px; bottom: 3px; font-size: 0.58rem; }

components.name: Keyboard Key
components.description: A compact Albanian key, including dedicated digraph keys.
components.css: .ds-key { min-width: 36px; height: 48px; border: 0; border-radius: 7px; background: var(--surface-strong, oklch(0.93 0.004 75)); color: var(--ink, oklch(0.19 0.014 65)); font: 820 0.75rem/1 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 150ms, transform 90ms; } .ds-key:hover { background: var(--surface-hover, oklch(0.9 0.008 75)); } .ds-key:active { transform: translateY(2px) scale(0.96); } .ds-key:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--focus, oklch(0.55 0.18 252)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Collected Letter Stamp
components.css: .ds-stamp { position: relative; width: 44px; height: 44px; display: grid; place-items: center; border-radius: 7px; background: var(--honey, oklch(0.68 0.146 74.6)); color: oklch(1 0 0); font: 840 0.75rem/1 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-stamp small { position: absolute; right: 3px; bottom: 2px; font-size: 0.52rem; }

narrative.overview: FJALË is a five-minute Albanian language ritual on a literal-white surface. One honey note gives the product a recognizable voice while the board, keyboard, and earned feedback remain the focus.
keyCharacteristics: Pure high-contrast surfaces with one scarce honey accent.
Compact system typography that disappears into the task.
Correct Albanian digraphs treated as first-class controls.
Flat-by-default components with fast state-driven motion.
Progress and celebration that appear only after earned actions.

rules.name: The One Honey Rule
rules.body: Honey is limited to identity, selection, and earned progress; it never decorates inactive surfaces.

rules.name: The Three-State Rule
rules.body: Correct, present, and absent colors are paired with visible symbols.

rules.name: The Utility Voice Rule
rules.body: Buttons and labels use sentence case or the natural spelling of letters.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Lifted Rule
rules.body: Resting page components have no ambient drop shadow.

dos: Do keep the board and keyboard visible before any explanatory feature.
Do pair every tile color with a symbol and a full Albanian screen-reader label.
Do reserve Coffee Honey for identity, selection, and earned progress.
donts: Don't turn FJALË into a flag-and-folklore souvenir.
Don't add casino-style reward chrome, coins, gems, or artificial urgency.
Don't make an English Wordle reskin.
Don't use color-only feedback, inaccessible motion, obscure daily answers, or punitive dictionary rejection.
